text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our day off, Winning Ticket and I go out to
watch a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each Umamusume on the track is following her
own dream. Seeing this, Winning Ticket is
encouraged to endeavor harder in her own
training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, despite her newfound determination,
she still struggles to make progress.
